flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Ohio Business College-Sheffield rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.4k → $11.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Ohio Business College-Sheffield rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.4k → $11.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Ohio Business College-Sheffield rose 151% between 2006 and 2009 (21.9% → 55.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Ohio Business College-Sheffield fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).
